query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.email,
  u.name,
  gm.mandateId,
  gm.status as mandate_status,
  gm.preferredPaymentDay,
  gm.joiningFeePaidAt,
  a.membershipTier,
  a.agentStatus
FROM gc_mandates gm
JOIN users u ON u.id = gm.userId
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles a ON a.userId = gm.userId
LEFT JOIN gc_subscriptions gs ON gs.userId = gm.userId
WHERE gm.status = 'active'
  AND gs.id IS NULL
ORDER BY gm.joiningFeePaidAt ASC;
